scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @scamradar/types && npm run build --workspace @scamradar/shared && npm run build --workspace @scamradar/server && npm run build --workspace @scamradar/web
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @scamradar/types && npm run build --workspace @scamradar/shared && npm run lint --workspace @scamradar/server && npm run lint --workspace @scamradar/web && npm run lint --workspace @scamradar/shared && npm run lint --workspace @scamradar/types
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @scamradar/types && npm run build --workspace @scamradar/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @scamradar/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @scamradar/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @scamradar/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @scamradar/types
